worker: codex-image-worker (ChatGPT subscription image_gen on OpenClaw box)
prompt:
A professional e-commerce main listing image on a pure white background, square 1:1.
This is a frozen multipack assembled and shipped by SALUTEM SOLUTIONS.
Reference images #2..#5 are SHA-verified reviewed retail-carton art for the recipe flavors, in order: #2 = "Peanut Butter & Honey Spread", #3 = "Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread", #4 = "Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread", #5 = "Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam". Copy each flavor only from ITS reference. Do not derive wrapper art from a carton, do not invent look-alike flavors, and do not omit a flavor.
The FIRST reference image is the immutable KIT ANCHOR — copy its exact styrofoam cooler, ornate green emblem, black wordmark/slogan, four gel packs, camera, lighting, and overall layout only; never copy its third-party products.
The cooler is the exact white textured EPS insulated shipping cooler from reference #1, at the same realistic 3/4 front angle with its lid leaning behind. Preserve the exact ornate green Salutem emblem, black SALUTEM SOLUTIONS wordmark, and black OUR BEST SOLUTIONS FOR YOU slogan.
Place this exact reviewed carton plan inside the cooler: EXACTLY 1 genuine 10-count carton of Peanut Butter & Honey Spread from reference #2, EXACTLY 4 genuine 4-count cartons of Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread from reference #3, EXACTLY 4 genuine 4-count cartons of Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread from reference #4, EXACTLY 3 genuine 4-count cartons of Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam from reference #5. The visible carton plan reconciles exactly to 54 sandwiches. Reproduce each flavor's genuine Uncrustables carton exactly from ITS reference, including its real wordmark, flavor name, colors, art, and genuine donor count badge. Show every recipe flavor, never merge designs, never add a look-alike flavor, and never show loose sandwiches.
CRITICAL PACK-COUNT RULE: preserve only the genuine retail pack count actually printed on each product's corresponding reviewed donor reference. Copy that donor count exactly; never erase, replace, borrow, or invent it. The aggregate listing quantity is 54 sandwiches: NEVER add 54 as a carton badge, wrapper badge, cooler label, gel-pack label, or image overlay merely because it is the listing total. It may appear on product packaging only if that exact reviewed donor art genuinely prints the same retail pack count.
CRITICAL: use ONLY the real Smucker's Uncrustables flavor name(s) exactly as printed on the reference product photo(s). Do NOT invent any flavor name, sub-name, tagline, or box colour (for example, never a made-up name like "Bright-Eyed Berry"). Copy the reference packaging faithfully; if unsure, reproduce it verbatim rather than guessing.
Show EXACTLY 4 white sealed branded gel packs in the approved layout: two inside the cooler, one on the left and one on the right of the products, plus two standing outside along the front/right presentation area. Every pack keeps the BLUE "FROZEN GEL PACK" header, BLUE "KEEP FROZEN" / "FOR FROZEN SHIPMENTS" wording, ornate green emblem, and black Salutem wordmark/slogan from anchor #1.
All cartons or wrappers must be physically seated inside the cooler cavity: lower edges occluded behind the front inner rim, shared perspective and lighting, realistic scale and overlap, believable cavity depth, and contact shadows. No floating products, gaps below products, alpha halos, flat pasted edges, or impossible cooler-wall intersections.
Apply SALUTEM SOLUTIONS branding ONLY to the cooler and the gel packs — NEVER onto the third-party product packaging.
Subtle frost and cold condensation on the cooler and packs; NO loose ice, NO crushed ice, NO ice cubes.
Reproduce ONLY the product's own packaging. Do NOT copy any retailer logo, store badge, price sticker, "roll-back", corner ribbon, or watermark from the reference photo — no Target, Walmart, Amazon, Costco, Sam's Club or any store branding anywhere in the image.
No people, no hands, no lifestyle background, no extra props, no overlaid text, no watermarks.

REFERENCE MAPPING (follow exactly):
Reference 1 is the Salutem Solutions cooler with gel packs — the scene anchor.
Reference 2 is the exact 10-count retail carton of Peanut Butter & Honey Spread. Draw exactly 1 of THIS carton: same proportions, same artwork, and its genuine printed "10" count badge — never any other number on it.
Reference 3 is the exact 4-count retail carton of Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread. Draw exactly 4 of THIS carton: same proportions, same artwork, and its genuine printed "4" count badge — never any other number on it.
Reference 4 is the exact 4-count retail carton of Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread. Draw exactly 4 of THIS carton: same proportions, same artwork, and its genuine printed "4" count badge — never any other number on it.
Reference 5 is the exact 4-count retail carton of Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam. Draw exactly 3 of THIS carton: same proportions, same artwork, and its genuine printed "4" count badge — never any other number on it.
ROW LAYOUT CONTRACT (mandatory): the cartons stand in stepped rows from back to front, one flavor per row:
Row 1 (back row, tallest): EXACTLY 1 carton — 1 carton of 10-count Peanut Butter & Honey Spread. Count them: one. Not 2, not 0 — exactly 1. No other carton may appear in this row.
Row 2 (row 2): EXACTLY 4 cartons — 4 cartons of 4-count Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread. Count them: one, two, three, four. Not 5, not 3 — exactly 4. No other carton may appear in this row.
Row 3 (row 3): EXACTLY 4 cartons — 4 cartons of 4-count Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread. Count them: one, two, three, four. Not 5, not 3 — exactly 4. No other carton may appear in this row.
Row 4 (front row): EXACTLY 3 cartons — 3 cartons of 4-count Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam. Count them: one, two, three. Not 4, not 2 — exactly 3. No other carton may appear in this row.
TOTAL cartons in the whole scene: EXACTLY 12. Any other total is an error.
If a row does not fill the cooler's width, leave that space empty (white foam or a gel pack) — NEVER add an extra carton to fill space.
Every carton is fully inside the frame and shows its complete front face; no carton is cropped by the image edge, sliced to a sliver, or hidden behind another.
UNIFORM CARTON SIZE: every 4-count carton in the scene has IDENTICAL dimensions — the Blackberry Boom cartons are exactly the same width and height as the Berry Burst cartons. Never draw a wider, double-width or stretched carton; if four equal cartons do not span the cooler, leave the leftover space empty.
EXACT FRONT TEXT: each carton front prints its flavor line exactly once with a single ampersand — the Honey carton reads exactly "Peanut Butter & Honey Spread Sandwich". Never duplicate a word, letter or "&" across a line break.
